title: Set up my shipping methods

topics.topic_name: Set Up My Back Office For Sales

bodyHtml:
Summary:

  • What are the new delivery requirements?
  • How is preparation time calculated?
  • How to add a new shipping method to a country or a category?


What are the new delivery requirements? 

Delivery options are key when purchasing online, and a better delivery experience for our customers means more sales for you. Rules are defined by category of products, please find more details below. 

 

Please note that these shipping times include preparation time.  

 


If you do cross the border, you are encouraged to use the express option for all cross-border flows. You can also add standard option for domestic flow with postal shipping provider to optimize price.

 

How is preparation time calculated?





Please note that:


 


  • The default cut-off time is 1:00 PM. You may update this setting in your Back-Office; however, it can only be set after 1:00 PM.


How to add a new shipping method to a country or a category?


You can set up different delivery methods, by country and by category. Please note that you must offer a free standard solution per country. 


Here's how to configure your default delivery methods:


 




 


Select the appropriate shipping provider:


 


  • 

    Domestic Flows: Postal shipping providers can only be used for domestic flows (Colissimo, DPD, Correos, Hermes).
    

  • 

    Cross Borders Flows: Express shipping providers must be used for cross-border flows.
    



 


Reminder of the best-in-class solution: BackShip


 


Main reasons to use Backship:


 


  • 

    Deliver Domestically & internationally, from and to all Europe,
    

  • 

    Edit automatically-filled labels in one click,
    

  • 

    Make your customers benefit from a high-quality delivery service,
    

  • 

    Benefit from the competitive prices we negotiated with shipping providers,
    

  • 

    Forget the pain of claim management with shipping providers, we handle it for you,
    



 


Benefit from a better tracking quality for your customers.
